title: besleria riparia
intro: Besleria riparia, also known as the 'Columbian Besleria', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a climbing epiphyte native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Besleria riparia can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal preparations such as teas and capsules to harness its medicinal benefits.
